title: Read-only gap-detection / conflation tool (authorized source vs OSM)
context: AI-assisted gap detection requires a tool that can compare an authorized, ODbL-compatible open dataset against current OSM data and emit a reviewed candidate list of missing or incomplete features. This tool must be strictly read-only — no write credentials, no upload code path — so the human-in-the-loop and OSM Import Guidelines are enforced by the data flow, not by reviewer vigilance. Queries use the Overpass API and OSM API v0.6 (read-only). Output is a reviewed candidate list (never an upload) with provenance attached.
objective: Build and ship a read-only gap-detection / conflation tool that compares an authorized open dataset against OSM and emits a reviewed candidate list of missing/incomplete features.
acceptanceCriteria: Tool is read-only: queries OSM via Overpass/API and reads an authorized source dataset; there is no write/upload code path and no OSM credentials are held.
Tool emits a reviewed candidate list of missing/incomplete features (never an upload), with per-feature provenance and the source's odblCompatible evidence attached.
Ships committed golden fixtures (synthetic/public OSM-vs-source inputs → expected candidate list); pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint passes green.
Code is licensed MIT; commits are DCO signed-off.
Pinned interface versions (OSM API v0.6, Overpass QL) are recorded in specVersions within the codebase.
Reviewed by the technical reviewer and the licensing/imagery reviewer.
resources: PLAN.md — Solution approach; Read-only OSM access protocol
output: A merged PR containing the read-only conflation tool (TypeScript/ESM, pnpm workspace), golden fixtures, passing CI, and specVersions recording pinned OSM API v0.6 and Overpass QL versions.
